description.value:
Humans have traveled across the galaxy and seen a little bit of everything on every imaginable type of planet. Many of your ancestors' stories have percolated down through storytellers and community records, allowing that knowledge to spread.

You can attempt one additional @UUID[Compendium.sf2e.actions.Item.Recall Knowledge] check to yield more information about a specific creature even if you failed the check once. If you're an expert in the relevant skill, you can use this ability even if you failed the same check twice.
